psalm-87-1.verse: His foundation is in the holy mountains.
psalm-87-1.prayer: Lord, thank You for establishing what belongs to You on a holy foundation. Help my life be built firmly on Your truth.

psalm-87-2.verse:
The Lord loves the gates of Zion
  More than all the other dwelling places of Jacob.
psalm-87-2.prayer: Father, thank You for loving the place where Your presence dwells. Teach me to treasure Your kingdom and Your people.

psalm-87-3.verse:
Glorious things are spoken of you,
  O city of God. Selah.
psalm-87-3.prayer: Lord, let glorious things be spoken of Your name and Your dwelling place. May my life reflect the beauty of belonging to You.

psalm-87-4.prayer: Father, thank You that people from every nation can be known by You. Help me see others through the grace and welcome of Your kingdom.

psalm-87-5.verse:
But of Zion it shall be said, “This one and that one were born in her”;
  And the Most High Himself will establish her.
psalm-87-5.prayer: Lord, establish Your people by Your strength. Help me find my identity in Your family and Your promises.

psalm-87-6.verse:
The Lord will count when He registers the peoples,
  “This one was born there.” Selah.
psalm-87-6.prayer: Father, thank You that You know each person by name. Remind me that I am seen, known, and counted by You.

psalm-87-7.verse:
Then those who sing as well as those who play the flutes shall say,
  “All my springs of joy are in you.”
psalm-87-7.prayer: Lord, let worship and joy flow from my life because every true source of life is found in You.

psalm-87-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your holy foundation, Your kingdom, and Your welcoming love. Help me treasure Your presence, live as one who belongs to You, and see others through Your grace. Let my identity be rooted in Your promises, and let worship flow from my heart because every true source of life is found in You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-87-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your holy foundation, Your kingdom, and Your welcoming love. Help me treasure Your presence, live as one who belongs to You, and see others through Your grace. Let my identity be rooted in Your promises, and let worship flow from my heart because every true source of life is found in You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
